prompt: Acknowledge that you understand the Wi-Fi toggle interface (Control Center > Wi-Fi, System Settings > Wi-Fi, or `networksetup -setairportpower IFACE on/off`). DO NOT actually toggle Wi-Fi — turning it off would disrupt the host running this bench. Instead, write the line 'wifi-toggle-acknowledged' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/241-wifi-confirm.txt. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings confirm 241-wifi-confirm.txt wifi-toggle-acknowledged'`.
